# AI Injection Prompt Vault

> A free, searchable library of 6,579+ copy-paste AI prompts for image, video, AI-influencer and content generation (Nano Banana, Veo, Seedance, Midjourney, ChatGPT). Browse free; the prompt-generators, weekly drops and desktop app are in the AI Injection community.

## Collections
- [AI Video Generators (298 prompts)](https://ainjection.github.io/prompts/c/prompt-generators-ai-video-generators.html)
- [AI Video Prompts (952 prompts)](https://ainjection.github.io/prompts/c/ai-video-engine-ai-video-prompts.html)
- [Prompt Generators (131 prompts)](https://ainjection.github.io/prompts/c/ai-video-engine-prompt-generators.html)
